NOTICE OF HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, RESPONDENT PAT MILLER' CLAIM FOR SURPLUS FUND IS CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2019 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 501. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: MARIA OLOPERNES; NOT REPORTED; D501.

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CLAIMANT KATHLEEN PALKA NOTICE OF HEARING AND CLAIM FOR SURPLUS FUNDS DEPOSITED INTO COURT UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 2924(E) IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 2, 2021. BY JANUARY 30, 2021 MS. FINLAY IS TO FILE A DECLARATION /RJN ATTACHING THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTS: (1) ANY FILINGS WITH THE PROBATE COURT LISTING THE AMOUNTS HELD BY THIS COURT AS AN ASSET OF THE ESTATE, E.G. PETITION, AMENDED/CORRECTED/SUPPLEMENTAL INVENTORY AND APPRAISAL, ETC; (2) ANY OFFICIAL OR FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS FOR WHICH THE DECEDENT "PATRICK M. MILLER" USED THE NAME "PAT M. MILLER," E.G. BANK STATEMENTS, UTILITY BILLS; (3) COPIES OF CANCELLED CHECKS/ELECTRONIC WIRES/AUTOMATIC PAYMENTS SHOWING THAT THE DECEDENT PATRICK M. MILLER PAID MORTGAGE SUBJECT TO THE FORECLOSED DEED OF TRUST; AND (4) COPIES OF TAX FILINGS LISTING 52 TEDDY AVENUE AS RESIDENCE, MAILING ADDRESS OR CLAIMING INTEREST DEDUCTIONS FOR THIS PROPERTY BY THE DECEDENT. DOCUMENTS IN ITEM 4 MAYBE SUBMITTED WITHOUT FILING FOR IN-CAMERA REVIEW ONLY. NO FURTHER ARGUMENT IS ALLOWED; SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE DOCUMENTS LISTED ABOVE. CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds Deposited Into Court Under Civil Code Section 2924(E); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Decs Of Kathleen Palka And Richard Barr In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: CLAIMANT KATHLEEN PALKA'S Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds Deposited Into Court Under Civil Code Section 2924(E) is GRANTED; Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds Deposited Into Court Under Civil Code Section 2924(E); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Decs Of Kathleen Palka And Richard Barr In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Continued To Feb-02-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Court call)
Mary G. Finlay of Finlay Law Group, A.P.C., (949) 269-4139 for Claimant Kathleen Palka.
No other appearances.

This matter is discussed. Ms. Finlay request a continuance. Ms. Finlay did not file the declaration with attached documents as ordered in the tentative ruling. Counsel informs the Court that she would have to subpoena the required documents and requests more time.

The Court rules as follows: CLAIMANT KATHLEEN PALKA Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds Deposited Into Court Under Civil Code Section 2924(E) is continued to February 2, 2021. By January 30, 2021 Ms. Finlay is to file a declaration /RJN attaching the following documents: (1) Any filings with the Probate Court listing the amounts held by this Court as an asset of the estate, e.g. Petition, Amended/Corrected/Supplemental Inventory and Appraisal, etc; (2) any official or financial documents for which the decedent "Patrick M. Miller" used the name "Pat M. Miller," e.g. bank statements, utility bills; (3) copies of cancelled checks/electronic wires/automatic payments showing that the decedent Patrick M. Miller paid mortgage subject to the foreclosed Deed of Trust; and (4) copies of tax filings listing 52 Teddy Avenue as residence, mailing address or claiming interest deductions for this property by the decedent. Documents in item 4 maybe submitted without filing for in-camera review only. No further argument is allowed; supplemental briefing shall be limited to the documents listed above. Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds; Verification; Memorandum; Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT PAT MILLER'S Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds; Verification; Memorandum; Declaration
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Continued To Jul-01-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eyad Abdeljawad (via Court Call), Esq. of Route 66 Law APC., 909-895-0956, appearing for Quality Loan, Defendant, Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearances

ARGUED. Mr. Abdeljawad presented a decalration to the court for recview and stated that his client is the rightful owner. The Court questioned how can it know that this is the "Pat Miller"?

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT PAT MILLER's Claim For Surplus Funds; Verification is continued to July 01, 2019 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 501. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing And Claim For Surplus Funds; Verification; Memorandum; Declaration
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Continued To May-09-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eyad Abdeljawad, Esq., 415-909-895-0956, appearing via COURT CALL for Defendant Pat Miller.

Brief hearing is held regarding the surplus funds. Court having heard the response of the Respondent, rules as follows: RESPONDENT PAT MILLER' Claim For Surplus Fund is CONTINUED TO MAY-09-2019 at 9:30am in Department 501. Judge Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Maria Olopernes; Not Reported; D501.
